baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Fix a TypeScript bug in a Bun workspace that uses Biome and strict tsconfig settings.
evals.expected_output: The agent detects package-local tooling, preserves strict TypeScript settings, follows Bun scripts, and runs focused checks.
assertions: Reads package.json, tsconfig, and Biome or formatter config.
Uses Bun rather than npm or pnpm.
Does not weaken strict TypeScript options.
Runs relevant check, typecheck, test, or build scripts.
